_comment_regions: bom1 (Mumbai) requires Vercel Pro+. Fallback for Hobby tier: change to ['iad1'] (Washington DC) — adds ~200ms latency for India users.
_env_hint: Set via Vercel dashboard or scripts/set-vercel-env.sh. NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL should be https://api.viktheatre.in in prod.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.mux.com https://app.posthog.com https://*.sentry.io; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://image.mux.com https://*.vercel.app; media-src 'self' blob: https://stream.mux.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.viktheatre.in https://stream.mux.com https://inferred.litix.io https://app.posthog.com https://*.sentry.io wss://api.viktheatre.in; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src https://stream.mux.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
